jdeatina:invoke-ws.doc:name: Invoke WS Address Book Manager
Invoke WS Customer Manager - Get Customer
Invoke WS Customer Manager - Create Customer

jdeatina:authenticate.jdeatina:input-parameters: #[output application/java --- { "JDE User": p('config.jdeUserMulesoft'), "JDE Password": p('config.jdePassword'), "JDE Environment": p('config.jdeEnvironment'), "JDE Role": p('config.jdeRole'), "Session Id": 0, "Transaction ID": 0, "JDE WS Connection": true }]

jdeatina:invoke-ws.doc:name: Invoke ws getCompany

jdeatina:logout.jdeatina:input-parameters: #[output application/java --- { "JDE Token": vars.company."JDE Token", "Transaction ID": 44444, "JDE WS Connection": true }]

jdeatina:invoke-ws.doc:name: Invoke WS JP420000 Create SO
Invoke WS Address Book Manager
Invoke WS
